scene: Byte the teen coding companion sits at his desk in bright afternoon light, hands on keyboard after recent commits

subjects.description: Byte, a teen-stage blue pixel art blob with gangly proportions, big expressive eyes showing ecstatic joy, sitting upright at desk with hands positioned on keyboard in active coding posture
subjects.action: typing with both hands, head turned slightly toward laptop screen with focused happy expression

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk, oversized silver laptop with amber screen glow, Chicago skyline visible through window
subjects.position: room background with desk in mid-ground

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette

mood: ecstatic and productive, energetic coding flow state
background: room with trophy shelf above desk showing exactly one golden 10-day trophy on left and exactly one green plant on right with clear spacing, food bowl on floor to right of desk with moderate kibble portions
